rationale: Educ. Code §45.061 governs reimbursement after bond defaults and commissioner authority to order tax rates for repayment. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict exists.
quote: the commissioner may order a school district to set an ad valorem tax rate capable of producing an amount of revenue sufficient to enable the district to
_note: No direct textual conflict. Indirect fiscal pressure on school district revenue from a larger homestead exemption is not addressed by this statute's operative provisions.
